Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's Q-AA-Q combos are fast and oppressive. Your Q is slow to charge. Avoid extended trades where she can land all her Q procs.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q combo — space away and let her waste it. When she dashes in, back off immediately.
Riven.early_game: Riven dominates early through burst damage. Play passive, farm under tower, and do not trade short. Use Q to farm safely.
Riven.mid_game: Your Q scaling improves. Her split push is strong but teamfights favor you. Group for fights and let her overextend.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight utility. Riven becomes less relevant if fights are grouped.
Riven.win_condition: Survive early safely. Scale into teamfights where your R and tankiness shine. Deny her side lane kills.
Riven.scaling: You outscale late through tankiness — Riven early-focused.
Riven.positioning: Stay back and farm. Avoid her combo range at all times. Play teamfights grouped.

Singed.trading_pattern: Singed's poison is relentless and he runs from your Q. His W flip denies your engagement. You can't catch him to trade.
Singed.ability_to_dodge: His R slow and flip — never chase him solo. He runs away and turns it into a win.
Singed.early_game: Singed proxies and kites. Your Q doesn't catch him. Play passive and farm safely from range.
Singed.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps slightly. His Rylai's slows you. Avoid chasing and teamfight instead.
Singed.late_game: He outscales through kiting ability. You outscale through pure tankiness. Focus teamfights with allies.
Singed.win_condition: Survive early, farm passively without chasing. Scale into teamfights. Never duel him alone.
Singed.scaling: He slightly outscales through kiting — you through raw tankiness.
Singed.positioning: Don't chase him ever. Farm and stay grouped. Let teamfights happen, don't duel.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's Q poke and parry deny your damage. Your Q is slow. She wins most trades through mobility and parry.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — when she stands still to parry, move away. Your Q auto-hit is negated by it.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora pokes safely and parries your damage. Play passive and don't extend trades.
Fiora.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps slightly. Her split push is oppressive. Avoid dueling her — teamfight instead.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight. Fiora excels in 1v1s but not grouped fights.
Fiora.win_condition: Farm passively early. Never trade into her parry. Group for fights and avoid duels.
Fiora.scaling: You outscale through teamfight superiority — Fiora through 1v1.
Fiora.positioning: Farm Q safely. Never trade into her parry. Stick to teamfights.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes safely from range with autos and Q. Your Q is slow to charge. His shroom zone denies extended fights.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded you can't respond to his poke.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo's poke is strong from safe range. Play passive and farm Q. Don't chase into shroom zones.
Teemo.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His shrooms zone teamfights. Group for fights and sweep shrooms.
Teemo.late_game: You outscale through teamfight impact and tankiness. Teemo becomes a split-push nuisance.
Teemo.win_condition: Farm Q early. Scale into teamfights. Control shroom spawns with sweepers and pinks.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through teamfight dominance — Teemo through split push.
Teemo.positioning: Farm Q safely from range. Avoid shroom zones. Play grouped for teamfights.

Jayce.trading_pattern: Jayce's range form pokes safely. Your Q is slow. Play around his form cycling and his gate jump is quick.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: His acceleration gate shockwave — move sideways. His melee form all-in is fast.
Jayce.early_game: Jayce outpokes from range. Play passive and farm your Q without exposing yourself.
Jayce.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His poke remains relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Jayce.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Jayce remains a poke threat but falls off in teamfights.
Jayce.win_condition: Farm Q passively early. Scale into teamfights. Avoid extended poke trades.
Jayce.scaling: You outscale through tankiness — Jayce through poke damage.
Jayce.positioning: Farm Q safely. Hide behind minions. Teamfight grouped.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence doesn't affect you much. His Judgment is oppressive close range. Your Q outpokes from distance.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q wind-up silence — when he winds up, back away. He still gains speed but can't catch you easily.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (Q spam with passive), Hollow Radiance

Garen.early_game: Trade with Q poke when he winds up Q. He scales to become a tankier threat.
Garen.mid_game: Your Q scaling improves. His tankiness and Sunfire help him. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Garen.late_game: Even — both scale as tankiness-focused teamfight champions.
Garen.win_condition: Trade Q poke early when safe. Scale into teamfights. Group always.
Garen.positioning: Trade Q poke carefully. Back away when Q winds up. Teamfight grouped.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. Your Q outpokes at range. Trade when his Q is down, never into his range.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed ring — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Stay close to negate his spacing.
Darius.early_game: Trade with Q poke when his Q is on cooldown. Walk into his range to negate his bleed distance.
Darius.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His ult is deadly in duels. Avoid 1v1s and focus teamfights.
Darius.late_game: Even — both have strong teamfight ults. Spacing matters.
Darius.win_condition: Trade Q poke when safe. Scale into teamfights. Never duel him low.
Darius.positioning: Trade Q poke from range. Walk into him to negate Q. Teamfight grouped.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage early. Your Q outpokes him. Trade gradually with Q to wear him down.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces your armor but doesn't stop your Q.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (Q spam with passive), Hollow Radiance

Malphite.early_game: Trade with Q poke. Malphite scales to become a teamfight god. Don't let him free farm.
Malphite.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His R is powerful in grouped fights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Malphite.late_game: Even — both scale as tankiness-focused teamfight champions.
Malphite.win_condition: Trade Q poke early. Scale into teamfights. Group for fights.
Malphite.positioning: Trade Q poke. Farm and scale. Teamfight grouped.

Varus.trading_pattern: Varus pokes with Q and applies on-hit stacks. His poke is safe from range. Your Q is slow.
Varus.ability_to_dodge: His R chain reaction — dodge by moving sideways. If hit, it spreads and locks you down.
Varus.early_game: Varus outpokes from range. Play passive and farm your Q from safe distance.
Varus.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His poke remains threatening. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Varus.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Varus remains a poke threat but less effective grouped.
Varus.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Avoid extended poke trades.
Varus.scaling: You outscale through tankiness — Varus through poke.
Varus.positioning: Farm Q safely. Avoid his poke angles. Teamfight grouped.

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze's poke is strong but manageable. Your Q scales well. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ryze.ability_to_dodge: His R teleport escape — move away when he channels. He can escape unfavorable fights.
Ryze.early_game: Ryze's poke is manageable. Farm your Q and scale. Don't be aggressive.
Ryze.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His teleport gives him options. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Ryze.late_game: Even — both scale well into teamfights.
Ryze.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Group for fights.
Ryze.positioning: Farm Q carefully. Avoid his poke angles. Teamfight grouped.

Shen.trading_pattern: Shen's E taunt is annoying. Your Q is slow. His W tankiness nullifies your poke effectiveness.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: His E taunt — move perpendicular to his charge. Walk sideways to dodge the taunt.
Shen.early_game: Shen is tanky with good engage. Play passive and farm your Q. Avoid his E.
Shen.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His R helps with teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Shen.late_game: Even — both scale as tanks with different utilities.
Shen.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Avoid his E taunt.
Shen.positioning: Farm Q carefully. Dodge his E taunt. Teamfight grouped.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox's Q range is massive and deals heavy damage. Your Q is slow. He dominates trades early.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — move sideways to dodge all 3. His Q is telegraphed but covers wide area.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox outpokes and outdamages early. Play passive and farm Q. Don't extend.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His all-in is still strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through pure tankiness. Aatrox falls off compared to teamfight tanks.
Aatrox.win_condition: Farm Q passively early. Scale into teamfights. Never duel him.
Aatrox.scaling: You outscale late through tankiness — Aatrox through damage.
Aatrox.positioning: Farm Q safely. Dodge his Q skillshots. Teamfight grouped.

Maokai.trading_pattern: Maokai's W pull and Q poke are strong. Your Q outpokes from range. Trade when his W is down.
Maokai.ability_to_dodge: His W pull — move away when he winds up. He has a channel before the pull.
Maokai.early_game: Maokai has decent early poke. Farm your Q and trade when W is down.
Maokai.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His tankiness improves. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Maokai.late_game: Even — both scale as tankiness-focused teamfight champions.
Maokai.win_condition: Trade Q poke when W is down. Scale into teamfights. Group always.
Maokai.positioning: Trade Q poke. Avoid his W pull. Teamfight grouped.

Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear's W bite and all-in are oppressive. Your Q is slow. He dominates close fights.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His R storm dive — move away from the impact zone. It deals massive damage and stuns.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear's all-in is strong. Play passive and farm Q from safe range.
Volibear.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His tankiness improves. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Volibear.late_game: You outscale through pure tankiness and teamfight utility. Volibear falls off.
Volibear.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Never duel him.
Volibear.scaling: You outscale late through tankiness — Volibear through damage.
Volibear.positioning: Farm Q safely from range. Avoid his W range. Teamfight grouped.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has no early game. Your Q outpokes him heavily. Trade whenever you can early.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — when he points at you, walk perpendicular. It slows but doesn't stun.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with Q poke and trades. Nasus has zero defense. Build a lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead matters. His stacking helps him. Group for fights to avoid late-game 1v1.
Nasus.late_game: Even — his stacks make him scale. You outscale through teamfights.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with Q poke. Build massive lead. Group for teamfights late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through teamfights.
Nasus.positioning: Poke Q aggressively early. Group for fights late. Don't duel him super late.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn's W brittle status and E charge are oppressive. Your Q is slow. He wins close trades.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His E charge — move sideways. It deals damage and stuns.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn's all-in is strong. Play passive and farm Q. Don't extend.
Ornn.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His tankiness and brittle make him stronger. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Ornn.late_game: Even — both scale as teamfight tanks. His item upgrades are strong.
Ornn.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Group always.
Ornn.positioning: Farm Q carefully. Avoid his E charge. Teamfight grouped.

Poppy.trading_pattern: Poppy's W zone and Q poke are decent. Your Q outpokes from range. Trade when W is down.
Poppy.ability_to_dodge: Her W zone — move out of it quickly. It prevents your dash and slows.
Poppy.early_game: Poppy has early poke but you can match with Q. Farm and trade safely.
Poppy.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. Her tankiness improves. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Poppy.late_game: Even — both scale as tankiness-focused teamfight champions.
Poppy.win_condition: Trade Q poke when W is down. Scale into teamfights. Group always.
Poppy.positioning: Trade Q poke. Avoid her W zone. Teamfight grouped.

Wukong.trading_pattern: Wukong's E dash combo is fast and oppressive. Your Q is slow. He wins early trades.
Wukong.ability_to_dodge: His E dash — move back when he dashes in. He can't auto after if you space well.
Wukong.early_game: Wukong's burst is strong. Play passive and farm Q. Don't extend.
Wukong.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His burst is still strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Wukong.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight. Wukong becomes less relevant.
Wukong.win_condition: Farm Q passively early. Scale into teamfights. Never duel him.
Wukong.scaling: You outscale late through tankiness — Wukong through damage.
Wukong.positioning: Farm Q safely. Space away from his E. Teamfight grouped.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's Q poke and range are solid. Your Q outpokes. Trade when her cooldowns are down.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her R invincibility — don't commit to fights when she ults. She heals and gains damage.
Kayle.early_game: Kayle's range is limited. Farm your Q and trade when safe. She scales late hard.
Kayle.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. Her range extends. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales through range and damage. You outscale through teamfight tankiness.
Kayle.win_condition: Trade Q poke early. Scale into teamfights. Avoid dueling her late.
Kayle.scaling: She slightly outscales through range — you through tankiness.
Kayle.positioning: Trade Q poke early. Avoid her range late. Teamfight grouped.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick's ghouls and cage are strong early. Your Q is slow. He wins trades through pet damage.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E cage — move sideways to avoid it. It traps and amplifies his damage.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls are oppressive. Play passive and farm Q from safe range.
Yorick.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. His maiden is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Yorick.late_game: You outscale through teamfight impact. Yorick excels in 1v1 and split push.
Yorick.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Group to avoid his 1v1.
Yorick.scaling: You outscale through teamfights — Yorick through 1v1.
Yorick.positioning: Farm Q safely. Avoid his cage. Teamfight grouped.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E tentacle test is devastating. Your Q is slow. She wins if you get tested.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E tentacle test — move away from her quick. If hit, you take massive damage.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi's tentacles zone you. Play passive and farm Q away from her.
Illaoi.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. Her tentacles zone teamfights. Avoid clustered fights.
Illaoi.late_game: Even — both strong in grouped fights. Her tentacles vs your tankiness.
Illaoi.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Space from her tentacles.
Illaoi.scaling: Even — both strong in grouped teamfights.
Illaoi.positioning: Farm Q away from tentacles. Space from E test. Teamfight spaced out.

Camille.trading_pattern: Camille's Q and E are oppressive. Your Q is slow. She wins through mobility and dueling.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Her E hook — move away when she winds up. She dashes and stuns.
Camille.early_game: Camille's dueling is strong. Play passive and farm Q. Don't extend.
Camille.mid_game: Your Q scaling helps. Her dueling is still strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Camille.late_game: You outscale through teamfight tankiness. Camille excels in 1v1.
Camille.win_condition: Farm Q passively. Scale into teamfights. Never duel her.
Camille.scaling: You outscale through teamfights — Camille through 1v1.
Camille.positioning: Farm Q safely. Avoid her E hook. Teamfight grouped.
